[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111110 7
1 00001000 1
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 01011111 6
5 10011011 5
6 10110110 5
7 00010111 4

23 32 00010110 3

56 65 00000010 1
67 76 00001000 1 match 1
70 07 00001000 1 match 1

13 31 00010011 3
24 42 10000100 2
35 53 00000011 2
46 64 10001100 3
57 75 00000000 a match 2 3

71 17 00001000 1 match 1

72 27 00000000 a match 2 3
